original_image_tags: Handwritten letter "D" or similar mark in the center of the lower half of the page.

elements.description: Page containing typed text of a memorandum or report regarding FBI and Air Force actions concerning slides, with a handwritten initial and some small black spots/marks on the paper.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the presence of a handwritten mark and small spots, but B omits the specific 'D or similar' detail, which is an omission without contradiction.
